PowerShell($ipv6 = \(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv6 | Where-Object { $_.PrefixOrigin -eq 'RouterAdvertisement' -and $_.SuffixOrigin -ne 'LinkLayer' } | Select-Object -First 1\).IPAddress; if \($ipv6\) { Write-Output "IPv6: $ipv6" } else { Write-Output "No public IPv6" })

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -Wait -ArgumentList '-NoProfile -Command "New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName \\"Report Platform 3001\\" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 3001 -Action Allow; Write-Output \\"Firewall rule added successfully\\"; pause"' 2>&1)

PowerShell($ipv6 = \(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv6 | Where-Object { $_.PrefixOrigin -eq 'RouterAdvertisement' -and $_.SuffixOrigin -eq 'Random' } | Select-Object -First 1\).IPAddress; if \(-not $ipv6\) { $ipv6 = \(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv6 | Where-Object { $_.PrefixOrigin -eq 'RouterAdvertisement' } | Select-Object -First 1\).IPAddress }; if \($ipv6\) { "IPv6: $ipv6"; "URL: http://[$ipv6]:3001" } else { "No IPv6" })

PowerShell($url = "https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-windows-amd64.exe"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\cloudflared.exe" -TimeoutSec 30 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Downloaded successfully" } catch { Write-Host "Failed: $_" })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://registry.npmmirror.com/-/binary/git-for-windows/v2.47.0.windows.1/Git-2.47.0-64-bit.exe" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\git-installer.exe" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Downloaded from npmmirror successfully" } catch { Write-Host "npmmirror failed: $_"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com/git-for-windows/v2.47.0.windows.1/Git-2.47.0-64-bit.exe" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\git-installer.exe" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Downloaded from huaweicloud" } catch { Write-Host "huaweicloud also failed: $_" } })
